title: Cozy HD
description: A hand-drawn texture pack that's quality over quantity.
body:
# Cozy HD

This hand-drawn resource pack is supposed to give you an at-home vibe and made to look smooth but familiar. Cozy HD's textures are carefully planned to give the uses the best experience possible. The pack was started from pure passion and free will. There was no deadline or project to submit, just me and some encouragement from my friends.

**This pack is 256x _and_ 512x**!

Prefer CurseForge? You can check it out [here.](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/cozy-hd)

### Some of the things you can expect from Cozy HD:
- Free HD textures that are smooth and (most of the time) seamless.
- A quality hand-drawn feel.
- A chill vibe that feels natural.
- _No AI._ This pack was 100% human-made.

I would also like to say that _this pack is still in beta,_ so any and all textures are subject to change.

Please leave any feedback for how I should improve this pack and let me know if there are any issues!
